response.justification: Bogdan brings roughly 20 years of polyglot engineering experience and is directionally aligned through recent AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work at re:cinq, along with genuine entrepreneurial background via GISCollective and startup experience. However, the role is a director-level IC position requiring recognized, demonstrated AI expertise at a strategic scale — advising enterprise customers, shaping cloud product roadmaps, and influencing organizational AI direction — none of which the resume evidences. His AI involvement is recent and implementation-focused rather than strategic, he holds no advanced degree in an AI-related field, and his career arc is that of a strong senior/staff engineer rather than a principal-level technical strategist.
strengths: ~20 years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, infrastructure, and embedded systems, comfortably exceeding the 15-year minimum
Current hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq signals genuine engagement with the AI tooling space
Demonstrated entrepreneurial track record as founder of GISCollective and early employee at WatchUp, aligning with the intrapreneurial profile the role prefers
concerns: No Master's or PhD in an AI-related field; both degrees are bachelor's level and neither is AI-focused
AI involvement is recent (current role only) and centers on tooling/infrastructure rather than shipping differentiated AI products or platforms at scale
No evidence of strategic customer advisory, cloud product strategy ownership, or organization-wide technical leadership — the core delivery expectations for this director-level IC role
